requirement_topic.en: Cell and Pack Safety — TR CU Basis and GOST IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——TR CU体系与GOST IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——TR CU體系與GOST IEC 62133

summary.en: Lithium cells, battery packs, and power banks placed in Kazakhstan must align to Kazakhstan market safety expectations through the EAEU TR CU mechanism. In practice this is implemented by conformity bodies using GOST and ST RK-adopted references, including GOST IEC 62133-based safety expectations for portable lithium packs, plus type-circuit and protective testing consistent with the EAEU scope. Final configuration, chemistry, protection design, and intended use determine whether the route is declaration or certification.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦的锂电芯、电池组及移动电源须通过EAEU TR CU机制对应其入市安全要求。实践中，合格评定机构通常结合GOST与ST RK采纳的条款实施，包含基于GOST IEC 62133的便携式锂电组安全要求及与产品实际配置一致的型式和防护测试。最终的分类、化学体系、保护设计和用途决定适用声明或认证路径。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦之鋰電芯、電池組及行動電源須透過EAEU TR CU機制符合入市安全要求。實務上，合格評定機構通常結合GOST與ST RK採納條款實施，包含基於GOST IEC 62133的便攜式鋰電組安全要求及與產品實際配置一致的型式與保護測試。最終分類、化學體系、保護設計與用途決定適用聲明或認證路徑。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — Low-voltage equipment safety requirements
GOST IEC 62133 basis for lithium cells and battery packs, where adopted through ST RK alignment
EAEU conformity assessment rules for TR CU scope products

summary.en: China baseline remains GB 31241-2022 and related domestic battery standards as technical starting points. These are used for Chinese domestic compliance and export quality management, but they are not the same compliance proof as the Kazakhstan EAEU technical-file route.
summary.zh: 中国基线仍以GB 31241-2022及相关国内电池标准作为技术起点。这些文件用于中国国内合规与出口质量管理，但不能直接替代哈萨克斯坦EAEU技术文件证明路径。
summary.zht: 中國基線仍以GB 31241-2022及相關國內電池標準作為技術起點。這些文件用於中國國內合規與出口質量管理，但不能直接替代哈薩克斯坦EAEU技術文件證明路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries

gap.en: The gap is usually in pathway recognition and documentation depth. A CN test report is useful, but it must be mapped to EAEU TR CU scope clauses for final in-country model variants. Differences commonly appear in failure criteria, abuse testing assumptions, and required declarations for importers and distributors.
gap.zh: 差距通常在路径认可与文件深度。CN测试报告有参考价值，但必须按最终本国入境型号映射到EAEU TR CU范围条款。常见差异出现在失效判据、滥用测试假设，以及进口商和分销商所需声明上。
gap.zht: 差距通常在路徑認可與文件深度。CN測試報告有參考價值，但必須按最終本國入境型號映射到EAEU TR CU範圍條款。常見差異出現在失效判據、濫用測試假設，以及進口商和分銷商所需聲明上。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product is within TR CU scope and placed on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic China sale where GB 31241 scope applies; domestic route remains separate from Kazakhstan route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB 31241 and CN safety reports as supporting material, then close documentation gaps against the EAEU TR CU 004/2011 route and ST RK/GOST adoption basis before shipment to Kazakhstan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将GB 31241和中国安全检测报告作为支持材料，再按EAEU TR CU 004/2011与ST RK/GOST采纳基础补齐文件差异后再安排出口到哈萨克斯坦。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將GB 31241和中國安全檢測報告作為支持材料，再按EAEU TR CU 004/2011與ST RK/GOST採納基礎補足文件差異後再安排出口到哈薩克斯坦。
